creator: ijliao@terry.dragon2.net
text:
update mrtg from 2.8.12 to 2.9.1

How-To-Repeat: 
diff -ruN /usr/ports/net/mrtg/Makefile mrtg/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/net/mrtg/Makefile	Thu Jun  8 02:48:31 2000
+++ mrtg/Makefile	Fri Oct 13 02:59:03 2000
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	mrtg
-PORTVERSION=	2.8.12
+PORTVERSION=	2.9.1
 CATEGORIES=	net
 MASTER_SITES=	http://ee-staff.ethz.ch/~oetiker/webtools/mrtg/pub/
 
diff -ruN /usr/ports/net/mrtg/distinfo mrtg/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/net/mrtg/distinfo	Sun Feb 13 05:45:53 2000
+++ mrtg/distinfo	Fri Oct 13 03:01:46 2000
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (mrtg-2.8.12.tar.gz) = 1279ae12c85c458cb5b3111fe5e01341
+MD5 (mrtg-2.9.1.tar.gz) = 78cb2e57d98ce1d16a240ad97100bd8f
